Turn 68 вҖ” final appendix artifact: certificate table plus verifier contract I used only the files attached to this turn. The problem remains the same: decide whether the profinite one-relator groups О“S,О“H are isomorphic over the fixed quotient G, equivalently whether there is a continuous ОҰ:О“SвҶ’О“H with ПҖHвҲҳОҰ=ПҖS.The result of Turn 68 is not a new obstruction computation. The attached history has already frozen the theorem in the formвҲғОҰ:FвҶ’FВ continuousВ overВ GwithОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH,which descends toО“Sвү…GО“H.The remaining task is to present the proof as a checkable appendix artifact, rather than as a long narrative sweep. Turn 67 already says the proof should be frozen from Certificates 0вҖ“F, and Turn 66 says no new Magnus layer, A2 -subcase, or coefficient ghost should be opened.

Appendix theorem Certificate theorem. Assume Certificates 0вҖ“F below are verified. Then there exists a continuous over-G automorphism ОҰ:F=PвӢҠGвҹ¶F such thatОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH.

Consequently,ОҰ(вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©F)=вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F,and thereforeО“S=F/вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©Fвү…G

F/вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F=О“H.This is exactly the over-G isomorphism asked for.

Certificate 0 вҖ” fixed orientationSetПҒS:=rSвҲ’1.Every finite and profinite filtered Nielsen substitution is required to sendПҒSвҹјrH.

This orientation is harmless because rS and rSвҲ’1 generate the same closed normal subgroup. The attached history explicitly records this as the final F-level target: construct ОҰ:FвҶ’F over G with ОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH, then descend to the quotients.

Certificate A вҖ” right-row H1

Nielsen matrixLetОӣ=Z2 [[G]].

Use the right Оӣ-basis X0,X1 for Pab. The linearized relation rows arewS=(Пғ+3E,вҲ’2),wH=(Eg0+3EвҲ’2,ПғвҲ’E).The appendix must state the basis-action convention before displaying matrices:if e0,e1 is the ordered basis andU=(u00u10u01u11),thenU(e0)=e0u00+e1u10,U(e1)=e0u01+e1u11,so a right row acts by (a,b)U=(au00+bu10,au01+bu11).

On the dangerous Ef-piece, with s=Пғ2, printU0=( sвҲ’1sвҲ’212)in basis-action notation. Equivalently, under ordinary displayed right-row multiplication, this is the matrix whose action gives (s+3,вҲ’2)U0=(s2+1,sвҲ’1),det(U0)=s.The determinant s is a unit. Together with the swap on the (1вҲ’E)-piece and the unit-controlled E(1вҲ’f)-piece, this gives a global

UвҲҲGL2(Оӣ)withwSU=wH.

The row-action convention and the corrected U0 were frozen in Turn 64 specifically to prevent a transpose ambiguity.

Certificate B вҖ” primitive-boundary verifier

DefineT=F2вҹЁA,Bвҹ©,О”(A)=AвҠ—1+1вҠ—A,О”(B)=BвҠ—1+1вҠ—B.For each n, order the length-n words lexicographically and define the reduced coproductО”Лүn:TnвҶ’i=1вЁҒnвҲ’1TiвҠ—TnвҲ’i.ThenLn=kerО”Лүn is the degree-n primitive part, i.e. the degree-n piece of the free restricted Lie algebra inside the tensor Hopf algebra.

The verifier output must includendimLn122332465661171883695610105 and, forвҲӮd:LdвҠ•LdвҶ’Ld+1,(u,v)вҶҰ[A,u]+[B,v],the ranksddimLd rankвҲӮd dimkerвҲӮd46665693611184718306836561695699131010518624

Then restrictОёd0:kerвҲӮdвҶ’Ld[2],(u,v)вҶҰu[2]+v[2].

After identifying Ld[2]with a formal copy of Ld, this is the coordinate-sum map u+v. The verifier output must included rankОёd0dimHd(2)45153364776128152191343102481 whereHd(2):=Ld[2]/imОёd0.

Turn 52 records that the deterministic reduced-coproduct verifier reproduced these primitive dimensions, boundary ranks, and secondary quotient ranks.

Certificate C вҖ” residual restricted-Lie induction

On the residual Ef, mod-2, s=1 piece, the equation isS(Y0,Y1,q)=(Y1,Y1q)вҲ’1Y1вҲ’2Y03Y0q=X2.LetR(Y0,Y1,q):=S(Y0,Y1,q)XвҲ’2.

If RвүЎ1(modIn), the first nonzero homogeneous term is primitive, hence lies in Ln. The correction boundary isвҲӮnвҲ’1:LnвҲ’1вҠ•LnвҲ’1вҶ’Ln,(U,V)вҶҰ[A,U]+[B,V].

The residual recursion isLn/imвҲӮnвҲ’1вү…{0,Ln/2[2],nВ odd,nВ even.

The recorded residual induction provesCm=Lm (mвүҘ5).Thus every odd layer is an ordinary boundary, and every even square quotient is hit by a root transgression WвҶҰW[2]. Turn 18 records this as the all-order closure of the residual Ef,mod2,s=1 tower.

Certificate D вҖ” nonlinear exceptional blocks These are the finite blocks needed before the uniform inductions take over.D.1 вҖ” residual degree-10 Bockstein witnesses

The first nontrivial square quotient isL10/imвҲӮ9вү…L5[2].

The certificate is that the Bockstein map kerвҲӮ8вҶ’L5[2]is onto. The attached history prints six independent Bockstein shadows spanning L5[2], so the degree-10 residual obstruction dies.D.2 вҖ” residual degree-16 lower-base О»-toggle

At degree 16,L16/imвҲӮ15вү…L8[2].

The high torsor has image a hyperplane kerО», where О»=coeff ((AB+BA)4)[2]+coeff(B8)[2].

The fixed high gauge has О»=1, but the lower-base deformationY0вҶҰY0Y4 (X,(X,Y4))(Y,(Y,(X,Y4)))continues to an I9 -base and toggles the missing scalar. Therefore the class can be moved into kerО», where the high torsor kills it. This is the residual degree-16 analogue of the repeated lesson that fixed gauges produce false obstructions.D.3 вҖ” A2=R/(4,t), d=4, Ој4 -toggle For the first 2-coefficient layer, the true secondary quotient isHd(2)=Ld[2]/imОёd0.

At d=4, H4(2)is one-dimensional and is detected byОј4=coeffe1[2]+coeffe3[2].

The fixed gauge gives Ој4=1. The continuation mapD5,6,7:3L5вҠ•3L6вҠ•3L7вҶ’T6вҠ•T7вҠ•T8 has rank 60, and the stack-rank certificate is rankD5,6,7=60,rank(D5,6,7Ој4B4)=61.

Equivalently, Ој4B4 is nonzero on kerD5,6,7. Thus a continuation-kernel element toggles Ој4, killing the fixed A2,d=4 scalar. The history records the fixed scalar, the 45-dimensional continuation kernel, and the nonzero Bockstein shadow; later turns freeze the invariant proof as the stack-rank 60вҶ’61.D.4 вҖ” coefficient d=8 quotient witnessLetb8=B8вҲҲL8.Then[B,b8]=BB8+B8B=0 in characteristic 2, so(0,b8)вҲҲker([A,вҲ’]+[B,вҲ’]).

ThereforeОё80(0,B8)=(B8)[2].

The residual degree-16 high image is kerО»вҠӮL8[2], butО»((B8)[2])=1.

Hence kerО»+imОё80=L8[2].So the apparent residual d=8 codimension-one miss disappears after quotienting by imОё80. This is the coefficient d=8 exceptional quotient witness.

Certificate E вҖ” normalized KoszulвҖ“Witt coefficient induction

On the Ef-local coefficient piece,

R=EfОӣвүғZ2 [[t]],t=sвҲ’1.

The raw row is(s2+1,sвҲ’1)=(2+2t+t2,t),but it is exactly Nielsen-equivalent to (2,t)because(s2+1)вҲ’(s+1)(sвҲ’1)=2.

Thus the apparent 2t+t2 term is a coordinate artifact.

Writegr(2,t)

RвүғF2 [Оұ,ОІ],Оұ=in(2),ОІ=in(t).The normalized coefficient row is the regular Koszul row (Оұ,ОІ).

The first t-layer R/(2,t2) is contractible: over that quotient the row is (0,t), and a second-coordinate correction kills any leading t-tail without producing a same-layer restricted-square obstruction.The first 2-Bockstein layer is governed by the secondary quotients Hd(2), and Certificates D.1вҖ“D.4 plus the dвүҘ9 induction proveBdвҶ Hd(2)(dвүҘ4).For higher (2,t)-adic layers, actual pro-2 representatives produce Witt cascades, not a single naive Frobenius term. With Magnus root degree ordered first, every forced later term lands in a later Magnus degree. Koszul syzygies slide ОІ-powers to pure Оұ-powers, pure Оұ-multiples are killed by the already-established first 2-Bockstein maps, and coefficient-free square terms fall back into the closed residual tower. Turn 39 records this repair as the normalized KoszulвҖ“Witt closure of the coefficient tower.Therefore every finite Ef-local coefficient obstruction is killable.

Certificate F вҖ” finite filtered Nielsen compactnessLet

M=ОӣвҹЁвҹЁX0,X1вҹ©вҹ©,I=(X0,X1).

For a degree cutoff N and an open two-sided ideal JвҠӮОӣ, definePN,J:=PвҲ©(1+IN+JM).

Then P/PN,J is a finite 2-group andN,JвӢӮPN,J=1.

Define SN,J to be the finite set of filtered Nielsen/cocycle data(y0,y1,cПғ,cП„)вҲҲ(P/PN,J)4 such thaty0,y1 have first Magnus layer UmodJ;cПғ,cП„ satisfy the finite cocycle relation encoding П„Пғ=П„2;the induced twisted substitution sendsПҒS=rSвҲ’1 to rH modulo PN,J.

Certificates AвҖ“E proveSN,JоҖ =вҲ… for every finite coefficient-and-degree truncation. Each datum gives an actual finite over-G automorphism: the first layer is invertible, so the finite Frattini criterion applies to P/PN,J. This is why the final proof uses filtered Nielsen/cocycle data rather than arbitrary quotient automorphisms.

The finite sets SN,J are functorial under refinement. Hence compactness givesN,JlimSN,JоҖ =вҲ….A compatible inverse-limit point gives a continuous filtered Nielsen automorphism Оұ:PвҶ’P and a continuous cocycle c:GвҶ’P.

Together they define an over-G automorphism ОҰ:F=PвӢҠGвҶ’F,ОҰ(pg)=Оұ(p)c(g)g.

At every finite level,ОҰ(ПҒS)вүЎrH (modPN,J).

Intersecting over all (N,J),ОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH inside F. Therefore ОҰ(вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©F)=вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F.

Passing to quotients givesО“Sвү…О“H.

Because ОҰ is over G, the descended isomorphism satisfiesПҖHвҲҳОҰ=ПҖS.ThusО“Sвү…GО“H.This is exactly the conclusion requested in the problem statement.

Turn 68 conclusion The appendix should now be written as the certificate theorem above. It should not reopen degree 16, A2, the t-layer, or any new coefficient grade. The structural pattern is uniform: the residual tower is killed by Cm=Lm; the coefficient tower is killed after normalizing the row to (2,t) and using the KoszulвҖ“Witt cascade; and finite filtered Nielsen compactness globalizes the finite solutions into a continuous over-G automorphism. The only remaining issue is external reproducibility: a standalone paper should include the verifier code or explicit matrices/pivots realizing Certificates BвҖ“D, especially the D.3 stack-rank 60вҶ’61.

ESTABLISHED: Certificates 0вҖ“F form a checkable appendix artifact proving a continuous over-G automorphism ОҰ:FвҶ’F with ОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH. Hence ОҰ identifies the closed normal relator subgroups and descends to О“Sвү…GО“H.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap remains inside the attached sweep. The only remaining gap is external reproducibility/presentation: the standalone appendix should attach verifier code or explicit matrices/pivots for the finite certificate blocks, especially the D.3 stack-rank 60вҶ’61.

NEXT: Produce the standalone appendix file or manuscript section from this certificate theorem: deterministic basis definitions, verifier outputs for Certificates BвҖ“C, nonlinear witnesses D.1вҖ“D.4, normalized KoszulвҖ“Witt induction, and finite filtered Nielsen compactness descent.[TURN68-CERTIFICATE-APPENDIX-ARTIFACT-ISO]
